name: 5.25" Mini Tabletop Peperomia Artificial Plant - Threshold™
description:
Bring a touch of greenery to your home decor without the hassle of maintenance with this Mini Tabletop Peperomia Artificial Plant from Threshold™. This natural-looking faux peperomia plant brings a lively vibe to your home decor, and it comes potted inside a white ceramic container with faux soil for easy display on any flat surface. Just place this artificial plant on the mantel, console or sideboard along with other potted plants to add warmth and texture to your space all year long.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
